The domain description says: "A rotation (fold) at node n consists of one action rotate and two following passes over to remaining part of string starting at n."
The actions are:
1. `rotate`: Rotates the heading of node `n` and starts the process. Sets `rotating` and `node-first-pass-next`.
2. `rotate-first-pass`: Iterates through the string, updating headings and freeing old positions.
3. `rotate-first-pass-end`: Ends the first pass when the end node is reached.
4. `rotate-second-pass`: Iterates through the string, setting new positions.
5. `rotate-second-pass-end`: Ends the second pass and clears `rotating`.

- `rotate-first-pass`: Parameters `(?nstart - node ?r - rotation ?n1 - node ?n2 - node ?n2x ?n2y - coord ?n2dir ?n2setdir - direction)`. Precondition: `CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2`, `node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1`. Effect: updates heading of `n2`, frees old pos, sets `node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n2`.
- `rotate-first-pass-end`: Parameters `(?nstart - node ?r - rotation ?n1 - node ?n2 - node ?n2x ?n2y - coord)`. Precondition: `END-NODE ?n2`, `CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2`, `node-first-pass-next ?nstart ?r ?n1`. Effect: frees old pos of `n2`, sets `node-second-pass-next ?nstart`.
- `rotate-second-pass`: Parameters `(?n1 - node ?n1x ?n1y - coord ?n1dir - direction ?n2 - node ?n2x ?n2y - coord)`. Precondition: `CONNECTED ?n1 ?n2`, `node-second-pass-next ?n1`, `at ?n1 ?n1x ?n1y`, `heading ?n1 ?n1dir`, `free ?n2x ?n2y`. Effect: sets `at ?n2 ?n2x ?n2y`, sets `node-second-pass-next ?n2`.
- `rotate-second-pass-end`: Parameters `(?n - node)`. Precondition: `END-NODE ?n`, `node-second-pass-next ?n`. Effect: clears `rotating`, clears `node-second-pass-next`.
